a message from the heart
Hey,
Jiya
💗
scroll down ↓
✦ from me, to you ✦

I'm so sorry for everything. You mean the world to me, and I never wanted to hurt you. Every moment we've shared is so soo sooo special, I can't forget any of it and would never ever forget. I am sorry for what happened to our relationship in last year, but we could sort it and be the old anvay jiya, the forever one. I love you a lot jiya, and I genuinely love you a lot. You are my support system jiya, pleasee sorry maaf krde yar. I promise I would change, and we can be happy like before. Please ek chance dede please yar. Itni saari memories hai, itna saara pyaar hai, sab khtm mt kr jiya please mat kr.

— with all my love 💗

our memories

✦ every moment with you ✦
